segments.text: He's got a solid read on that getup attack!
segments.original_text: 攻撃上がりはしっかり掴んでいる
空中ショットを狙ってくるんですが

segments.text: Pulling back just a bit saved him!
segments.original_text: 少し身を引いていたので助かりました

full_text: He's got a solid read on that getup attack! He's committing to aerials though... Pulling back just a bit saved him! But this one...
